268 I0300_DYSRHYTHMIA_CD I0300_DYSRHYTHMIA_CD I0300 Active Diagnoses: Dysrhythmia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a diagnosis of atrial fibrillation or other dysrhythmias (e.g., bradycardias and tachycardias) in the last seven days. -=Not
